title: Pentacalia viridialba

Pentacalia viridialba belongs to the family Asteraceae, specifically within the genus Pentacalia, which is a group of flowering plants native to South America. The genus Pentacalia is part of the tribe Senecioneae, which comprises daisy-like plants with similar characteristics. Pentacalia viridialba is further classified within the subfamily Asteroideae, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared traits among these plants.
